div1.entryFree: Commandement (quadrisyll.) == command: let his deservings and my love withal be valued 'gainst your wife's c. Merch. IV, 1, 451 (M. Edd. commandment). from him I have express c. H6A I, 3, 20 (M. Edd. commandment). At c. == at pleasure: if to women he be bent, they have at c. Pilgr. 418.
